name: 爆款视频分析工具
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq ffmpeg chromium-browser && pip install -r requirements.txt && npm install && npx playwright install chromium && npx playwright install-deps chromium && echo '=== 环境就绪 ===' && echo '启动服务: python api_server.py --port 8080'
